html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<style>
  html, body { margin:0; padding:0; width:100%; height:100%; overflow:hidden; background:#fff; }
  .tooltip {
    position: fixed; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55); color: #fff; font: 11px/1.4 sans-serif;
    padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; pointer-events: none; z-index: 100; white-space: nowrap;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<svg id="svg" width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 600 283" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet">
    <defs>
        <marker id="arrow" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" refX="5" refY="3" orient="auto">
            <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L6,3 z" fill="#333" />
        </marker>
    </defs>
    
    <!-- Image and arrow -->
    <image href="" x="10" y="30" width="80" height="80" />
    <path d="M100,70 Q150,50 200,70" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" />

    <!-- Prediction bars -->
    <g transform="translate(220, 20)">
        <!-- Bars and labels -->
        <% let yOffset = 0; %><% ['dolphin', 'cat', 'grizzly bear', 'angel fish', 'chameleon', 'guitarfish', 'iguana', 'elephant'].forEach(label => { %>
          <% if (label === 'guitarfish') { %>
            <text x="-70" y="<%= yOffset %>" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif" font-weight="bold"><%= label %></text>
            <rect x="0" y="<%= yOffset - 5 %>" width="80" height="10" fill="#000" />
            <% yOffset += 30; %>
          <% } else { %>
            <text x="-70" y="<%= yOffset %>" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif"><%= label %></text>
            <rect x="0" y="<%= yOffset - 5 %>" width="40" height="10" fill="#000" />
            <% yOffset += 30; %>
          <% } %>
        <% }); %>
    </g>

    <!-- Ground truth label -->
    <g transform="translate(350, 20)">
        <text font-size="14" font-family="sans-serif" text-decoration="underline">Ground truth label</text>
        <% yOffset = 30; %><% ['dolphin', 'cat', 'grizzly bear', 'angel fish', 'chameleon', 'guitarfish', 'iguana', 'elephant'].forEach(label => { %>
          <% if (label === 'guitarfish') { %>
            <text x="0" y="<%= yOffset %>" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif" font-weight="bold"><%= label %></text>
            <rect x="80" y="<%= yOffset - 5 %>" width="80" height="10" fill="#000" />
            <% yOffset += 30; %>
          <% } else { %>
            <text x="0" y="<%= yOffset %>" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif"><%= label %></text>
          <% } %>
        <% }); %>
    </g>

    <!-- Elementwise scores -->
    <g transform="translate(480, 20)">
        <text font-size="14" font-family="sans-serif" text-decoration="underline">Elementwise scores</text>
        
        <!-- How much better you could have done -->
        <text x="75" y="60" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">How much better</text>
        <text x="75" y="75" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">you could have done</text>
        
        <!-- Braces -->
        <path d="M0, 40 Q5, 50 10, 40" fill="none" stroke="#333" />
        <path d="M140, 40 Q135, 50 130, 40" fill="none" stroke="#333" />
        <path d="M10, 40 L130, 40" fill="none" stroke="#333" />
        
        <!-- Bar -->
        <rect x="30" y="30" width="40" height="10" fill="#000" />
        <rect x="70" y="30" width="40" height="10" fill="red" />
    </g>
</svg>
<script>
try {
  const svg = document.getElementById('svg');
  const tooltip = document.createElement('div');
  tooltip.className = 'tooltip';
  document.body.appendChild(tooltip);

  const bars = svg.querySelectorAll('rect');
  bars.forEach(bar => {
    bar.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
      bar.setAttribute('stroke', '#666');
      bar.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
      tooltip.innerHTML = 'This bar represents the predicted log probability of the class.';
    });
    bar.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      bar.removeAttribute('stroke');
      bar.removeAttribute('stroke-width');
      tooltip.style.display = 'none';
    });
  });

  svg.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    tooltip.style.left = (e.clientX + 12) + 'px';
    tooltip.style.top = (e.clientY - 28) + 'px';
    tooltip.style.display = 'block';
  });

  function showPopup(title, body) {
    window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'alex-popup', title, body }, '*');
  }

  function hidePopup() {
    window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'alex-popup', title: null }, '*');
  }

  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') hidePopup();
  });

  svg.addEventListener('click', e => {
    if (e.target === svg || e.target.tagName === 'svg') hidePopup();
  });
} catch (err) { console.error(err); }
</script>
</body>
</html>
